articles.title_en: Mishustin: Russia and Uzbekistan have taken interaction to a new level
articles.lead_en: The Chairman of the Russian Government announced the expansion of economic interaction, the development of industrial cooperation, and the intensification of interregional ties between the two countries
articles.title_raw: Мишустин: РФ и Узбекистан вывели взаимодействие на новый уровень
articles.lead_raw: Председатель правительства России сообщил о расширении экономического взаимодействия, развитии промышленной кооперации, активизации межрегиональных связей меду двумя странами

articles.title_en: Mishustin: Russian investments in the economy of Uzbekistan exceeded 4 trillion rubles
articles.lead_en: According to the Russian Prime Minister, development institutions are actively working in Uzbekistan - the VEB.RF group and the Russian Export Center, which is part of it
articles.title_raw: Мишустин: инвестиции РФ в экономику Узбекистана превысили 4 трлн рублей

articles.title_en: Mishustin will visit Uzbekistan on a two-day working visit
articles.lead_en: The Chairman of the Russian Government will hold negotiations with the country's leadership, during which "it is planned to consider current issues of Russian-Uzbek interaction in the trade, economic, investment, scientific, technological, cultural and humanitarian spheres"

articles.title_en: Russia’s central bank chief Nabiullina to appear at press conference after nearly two weeks out of public view — she missed the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum and a meeting with Putin
